subject: Call for Proposals: Share Your SchoolAI Success at BETT 2027!
previewText: Showcase your innovative work with SchoolAI on the global stage at BETT 2027.
module-4-0-0:
Dear SchoolAI Community,

We invite you to share your innovative work and best practices with the global education technology community by submitting a proposal for the BETT Conference in 2027! This is an unparalleled opportunity to showcase how you are using SchoolAI to transform learning and address the most critical issues in EdTech today.

BETT is looking for proposals that align with the most pressing topics in the sector. We encourage you to focus your submission on one of the following key areas, which are central to the SchoolAI mission and highly appealing to the BETT audience:

  • Supporting Students' Cognitive Growth: Proposals that demonstrate how you are moving beyond simple AI consumption, helping students think more deeply, reflect on their learning, and engage meaningfully with AI outputs.
  • Robust Content Filtering: Submissions that highlight your strategies and best practices for leveraging content filtering to ensure protection against harmful or inappropriate content, including how you manage controls for different ages, contexts, and needs (such as SEND/Special Educational Needs and Disabilities).
  • Ensuring Safeguarding and Oversight: Presentations that address clear expectations around age-appropriate use, provide visibility into AI usage, and offer support for Designated Safeguarding Leads (DSLs) or other responsible adults when AI is used in learning contexts.

Your success stories are what drive the future of educational AI. By aligning your proposal with one of these hot topics, you increase the likelihood of being selected to present on the global stage.

Start drafting your proposal today! We look forward to seeing your innovative work represent the SchoolAI community at BETT 2027. If you have any questions or would like to discuss your proposal idea, please don't hesitate to reach out to nicholas@schoolai.com. For the most up-to-date information, resources, and support, we also encourage you to join the SchoolAI Champions program.

Sincerely,

The SchoolAI Team
